ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_type_id") REFERENCES company_types ("company_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company */,
  "reference_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial data */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit of the company */,
  "distributed_dividend" REAL /* Distributed dividend of the company */,
  "retained_profit" REAL /* Retained profit of the company */,
  "payout_ratio" REAL /* Payout ratio of the company */,
  "dividend_yield_on_equity" REAL /* Dividend yield on equity of the company */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the financial data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the financial data (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_types" (
  "company_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company type */,
  "company_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the company type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_attempts" (
  "attempt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date of the login attempt */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Whether the login attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attempt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_attempts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report is about */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the report */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_views_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of data source (e.g., annual report, financial statement) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES data_sources_types ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources_types" (
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source type */,
  "source_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_type_id")
)
